vocab.schema: schema.prisma: model User { id Int @id @default(autoincrement()) }. prisma generate after changes.
vocab.query: prisma.user.findMany({ where, select, include, orderBy, skip, take }). prisma.user.create({ data }). prisma.user.update({ where, data }).
vocab.relations: include: { posts: true } for eager loading. select: { id: true, name: true } for projection. Nested writes for relations.
vocab.migrations: prisma migrate dev for development (creates + runs migration). prisma migrate deploy for production CI.
vocab.transactions: await prisma.$transaction([op1, op2]) for batch. await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => { ... }) for interactive.
